summary_text: 1. Recommended safe action Create a new **`draft`** in Notion (not `approved`), keep the quote URL out of body text, set `source_url` to the X post, and leave `scheduled_for` empty until the `2026-04-01 22:00` collision is explicitly resolved. This follows Xauto quote rules and avoids accidental auto-post conflicts. 2. Exact commands (inspect first, mutate only if approved) ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto && python3 - <<'PY' import json from notion_sync import load_posts_from_notion slot = "2026-04-01 22:00" posts = load_posts_from_notion() hits = [p for p in posts if p.get("scheduled_for")==slot and p.get("status")=="approved"] print(f"approved_at_{slot}: {len(hits)}") for p in hits: print({ "id": p.get("id"), "notion_page_id": p.get("notion_page_id"), "status": p.get("status"), "scheduled_for": p.get("scheduled_for"), "source_url": p.get("source_url"), }) PY ``` ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto && python3 - <<'PY' import uuid from datetime import datetime from notion_sync import push_new_to_notion post = { "id": uuid.uuid4().hex, "scheduled_for": "", # keep empty until slot conflict is resolved "text": "BLOCKのmini-AGI構想は、組織設計そのものを再定義する話だと感じた。機能追加ではなく構造の更新としてAI戦略を見る視点が重要。\n\nこの論点は日本企業のAI導入にもそのまま刺さる。", "status": "draft", "created_at": datetime.now().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), "category": "AI時代の人間論", "pattern": "速報解説+切込み型", "source_url": "https://x.com/jack/status/2039004606890463261?s=20", } page_id = push_new_to_notion(post) print("created_draft_page_id:", page_id) PY ``` ```bash # Optional follow-up only after explicit approval to use 22:00: cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto && python3 - <<'PY' from notion_sync import _notion_request, _NOTION_BASE target_page_id = "REPLACE_WITH_NEW_DRAFT_PAGE_ID" _notion_request("PATCH", f"{_NOTION_BASE}/pages/{target_page_id}", { "properties": { "Scheduled": {"date": {"start": "2026-04-01T22:00:00+09:00"}} } }) print("scheduled:", target_page_id, "-> 2026-04-01 22:00") PY ``` 3. Blockers - `2026-04-01 22:00` is already occupied by an existing `approved` post (queue collision risk). - Notion credentials/connectivity are required for `load_posts_from_notion` and `push_new_to_notion`. - If this new draft must actually publish at 22:00 today, one explicit decision is needed: which post keeps that slot.
